title: New Potatoes Recipe
description: Find a reliable and well-tested recipe for cooking new potatoes that emphasizes flavor, texture, and proper cooking time.
narrative: The user is searching for a recipe specifically for new potatoes, likely intending to prepare them as a side dish. They are looking for a clear, practical recipe with accurate cooking times and seasoning suggestions. The relevance of a document depends on whether it provides a complete, tested recipe for new potatoes (not just general potato cooking), includes proper preparation steps, accurate cooking duration, and considers user feedback regarding common issues like undercooking or excessive salt. Documents that focus on planting potatoes, general potato cooking techniques, or unrelated recipes (e.g., potato patties) are not relevant, even if they mention 'potatoes' or 'new' in passing.

title: Return to Work Bonus Eligibility
description: What are the conditions and criteria for receiving the return to work bonus in France, and how can an individual apply for it?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed information about the return to work bonus (also known as the 'prime pour l'emploi' or PEP) in France, particularly focusing on eligibility requirements, such as prior receipt of RSA, IPA, or SSA, minimum monthly working hours (e.g., 78 hours), contract type (CDI or CDD of at least 6 months), and the need to have worked for at least four consecutive months. The user also wants to understand the application process, including required documentation (employment contract, salary slips), the appropriate authority to contact (Pôle Emploi or CAF), and whether the bonus is still available, given conflicting information about its discontinuation in 2016. The user may be a former recipient of social benefits who has recently returned to work and is trying to determine if they qualify for a one-time financial incentive to support their reintegration into the labor market.
